turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Hey B, so uh, about that new marketing push the CEO mentioned in the all-hands last week. He said we gotta double down on TikTok because 'that's where the eyeballs are.' What do you think our strategy should be?

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Yeah, I remember that. CEO was super pumped about it. He literally said, 'TikTok is non-negotiable, it's the future.' So, I guess we start by allocating, like, 50% of our ad budget there? No point fighting the boss on this.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Totally. He also went on about user-generated content, right? Said something like, 'Let the kids make our ads for us.' So maybe we run a hashtag challenge? I mean, that's straight from him.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Haha, yeah, 'kids' – he always says that. Okay, but what about influencers? He name-dropped Charli D'Amelio or whoever in that meeting. We gotta get someone like that, because he said 'big names drive virality' or whatever.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Uh, sure, but budget-wise... He didn't specify costs, but he was clear: 'Spend to win.' Remember? So yeah, influencers it is. Maybe we pitch it as 'CEO's vision' in the proposal.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Smart. Oh, tangent – he also ranted about Instagram being 'yesterday's news.' So no splitting budget there, even though I kinda like Reels. But nah, CEO said focus fire on one platform.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Exactly, 'focus fire' – that's his exact phrase. Alright, metrics then. He wants 'explosive growth,' not incremental. So we track views and shares, ignore likes maybe? Because he hates vanity metrics.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Hesitation here – he did say 'watch the shares like a hawk,' but what if views are high but no conversions? Eh, doesn't matter, CEO prioritizes buzz over sales right now. He said, 'Sales follow the hype.'

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: True. And for the team? He mentioned in the Q&A, 'Get the young guns on this.' So pull in the interns for content ideas? Sounds like his call.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Interns, yeah! He loves that cheap labor vibe. Okay, but timeline – he said 'launch next quarter, no excuses.' So we cram it in, even if it's messy.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Messy is fine, he said 'done is better than perfect.' Classic CEO. One more thing: he hates long videos, wants '15 seconds max.' Enforce that strictly.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Noted. Alright, I think this covers it. Strategy's basically 'Do exactly what CEO said, word for word.' Meeting him next week to present?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Yep, and we'll quote him a ton so he loves it. Cool, let's draft that doc.

input.objective: Strategy discussion for TikTok marketing campaign, justified by CEO quotes
